validation_gates.reason: Repository identity, admin permission, public visibility, immutable base, target blob, review-branch route, two-file change budget, acceptance criteria, and non-goals were resolved before mutation.

Directory Rules was extracted, rendered, and visually inspected; the repository copy confirms packages/ as the canonical shared-library root. The existing package path is preserved and no parallel authority is introduced.

ADR-0014, the drift register, parent package README, source README, and module README were inspected. Companion documents were distinguished from the package-level authority and no accepted temporal ADR was inferred.

No matching open pull request was found. Main was re-pinned at f9c257b8f9ba9479bce69dfa2fd2411b9cdcf566 after an unrelated two-path Habitat/Fauna documentation change; the temporal target baseline remained blob 974a7137983aa8d88605fad07fbca2b6e0026e04.

The indexed workflow inventory and its unchanged state through the pinned base were checked. Broad pull_request jobs may run, but no pull_request_target, workflow_run, self-hosted runner, direct secret reference, or ordinary write scope was established for this path; required-check and effective-token settings remain unverified.

Direct reads confirmed kfm-temporal version 0.0.0, an empty __init__.py, a comment-only core.py, a placeholder validator, and no declared package-local test command. The README does not claim a runtime API.
The schema, proposed ADR-0014, and draft time-awareness doctrine use non-equivalent vocabularies. The README preserves the conflict and selects no new authority.

The parent package README expectations, original six-time-kind and acceptance-check intent, implementation boundary, trust membrane, lifecycle discipline, validation burden, correction, and rollback posture are preserved with evidence labels.
The README has one H1, consecutive heading levels, unique slugs, a closed metadata wrapper, balanced fences, no trailing whitespace, a final newline, and no detected credential pattern.
All twenty unique repository-relative link targets resolved by direct GitHub reads at the pinned base.
The documentation contains no credentials, restricted payloads, living-person or genomic data, protected locations, operational instructions, or release/publication action.
The receipt parsed as JSON and validated against the checked-in generated-receipt schema before remote mutation.
Remote Git-object creation and ref advancement occur after this receipt is emitted; the pull request and operation journal record the resulting atomicity and remote readback.
This is an API-only documentation change, repository scripts were not executed, and the package declares no confirmed package-local test command.
The receipt is emitted before remote writes; branch, commit, file hashes, changed paths, pull request metadata, and checks require post-mutation verification.
Human review remains pending and separate from generation, static validation, merge, release, and publication.

notes: Task kfm-temporal-package-readme-20260721. Documentation-only review-branch revision plus required provenance receipt. The receipt is process memory, not factual proof, policy permission, human approval, merge approval, release authority, or publication authority.
